Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of A Minor
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Ronald H. Rouda, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Kimberly Smith, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Annie Smith present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded. Minor: Annie Smith present in court. Father of minor Howard Smith present in court.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $25,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $6,250.00 payable to Law Firm of Rouda, Feder, Tietjen & McGuinn.
A net balance of $18,750.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Exchange Bank, Healdsburg Branch, 1031 Vine Street, Healdsburg, CA 95448 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on January 29, 2012 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
